query_title: Bring It On: Cheer Or Die

recommendations.title: Bring It On: All or Nothing
recommendations.overview: A transfer student at a rough high school tries joining the cheer-leading squad and finds that she not only has to face off against the head cheerleader, but also against her former school in preparation for a cheer-off competition.

recommendations.title: Baskin
recommendations.overview: A squad of unsuspecting cops go through a trapdoor to Hell when they stumble upon a Black Mass in an abandoned building.

recommendations.title: The Tripper
recommendations.overview: A Ronald Reagan-obsessed serial killer targets a bunch of hippies who are heading to a weekend-long concert.

recommendations.title: Stan Helsing
recommendations.overview: A spoof on many horror movie series. Ending his shift at the video rental, Stan's picked up by his BFF and 2 cute girls, all going to a Halloween party. Will they even get there?

recommendations.title: Bring It On Again
recommendations.overview: When new students can't get onto their college cheerleading team, they form their own squad and prepare for a cheer off.

recommendations.title: Tamara
recommendations.overview: Tamara, an unattractive girl who is picked on by her peers, returns after her death as a sexy seductress to enact revenge.

recommendations.title: Knife+Heart
recommendations.overview: In the summer of 1979, gay porn producer Anne sets out to film her most ambitious film yet, but her actors are picked off, one by one, by a mysterious killer.

recommendations.title: Hell Fest
recommendations.overview: On Halloween night at a horror theme park, a costumed killer begins slaying innocent patrons who believe that it's all part of the festivities.

recommendations.title: The Pool
recommendations.overview: International students at an elite Prague school are stalked and murdered by a masked killer while holding a party in an abandoned water park.

recommendations.title: Lady in White
